long_description:
Coles Finest Hot Honey Cheese Curd Bites 200g


  • Honey cheese curd bites
  • Medium spice level
  • No artificial colours and flavours


Coles Finest brings you premium products to elevate any occasion. These moreish Coles Finest Hot Honey Cheese Curd Bites have been expertly developed by our dedicated team of chefs to create the perfect appetiser, ready to bake in the oven. they're crispy on the outside with a gooey cheesy centre that's sweetened with Beechworth honey and seasoned with red chillies for a hint of heat.


Coles Finest Hot Honey Cheese Curd Bites bake from frozen in the oven or air fryer in just 7 minutes. they're the perfect no-prep nibbles for parties and get-togethers. To serve, plate up Coles Finest Hot Honey Cheese Curd Bites around a bowl of dipping sauce (a zesty hot salsa or tomato-based relish with sweet roasted capsicum will pair well with the salty cheese) then arrange on a party platter or grazing table.
name: Hot Chilli Honey Cheese Bites

long_description:
Coles Finest Pumpkin and Sage Arancini with Grana Padano Cheese 200g


  • Pumpkin and sage arancini balls
  • 8 pack
  • No artificial colours and flavours


Coles Finest brings you premium products to elevate any occasion. These delicious Coles Finest Pumpkin and Sage Arancini with Grana Padano Cheese have been expertly developed by our dedicated team of chefs to create the perfect appetiser, ready to bake in the oven. they're filled with a sweet and salty combination of pumpkin, parmesan cheese and sage with creamy arborio rice, encased in a golden brown herb crumb.


Coles Finest Pumpkin and Sage Arancini with Grana Padano Cheese bake from frozen in the oven or air fryer in less than 15 minutes so they're perfect for no-prep party food or as an appetiser for any meal. You can serve them either hot or cold which makes them ideal for antipasto platters and grazing plates.


Try Coles Finest Pumpkin and Sage Arancini with Grana Padano Cheese with your favourite dipping sauce, something tomato-based will complement the flavours beautifully, and top with a fried sage leaf for an impressive and tasty dish.
name: Pumpkin & Sage Arancini With Grana Padano Cheese

ingredients: INGREDIENTS: Potato (46%), Wheat Flour, Water, Milk, Butter (6%) [Cream (Milk), Starter Culture (Milk)], Free Range Egg, Provolone Cheese (2.0%) [Milk, Salt, Animal Rennet], PDO Pecorino Romano Cheese (1.5%) [Sheeps Milk, Salt, Animal Rennet], Salt, Sunflower Oil, Spices (0.5%) [Black Pepper (29%), White Pepper, Pink Peppercorn, Green Peppercorns, Juniper Berry, Cloves], Onion, Sugar, Balsamic Vinegar.
long_description:
Coles Finest Italian Potato Gnocchi with Cacio E Pepe Sauce 400g


  • Classic Italian-style gnocchi
  • Cheesy black pepper sauce
  • Ready in 7 mins


A traditional and deliciously simple taste of Italy that is bursting with flavour.


Coles Finest Italian Potato Gnocchi with Cacio E Pepe Sauce features pillowy soft potato gnocchi in a creamy Italian cheese sauce finished with cracked black pepper. Cacio e pepe simply translates to cheese and pepperand is a classic Italian dish that packs a lot of flavour.


Coles Finest Italian Potato Gnocchi with Cacio E Pepe Sauce starts with tender potato gnocchi which is drenched in a velvety smooth cream sauce made from a blend of Italian cheeses and finished with aromatic cracked black pepper. It's the perfect date night meal for two, ready to be cooked to perfection in just 7 mins. Enjoy as is or serve with some crusty bread and a simple green salad.


Coles Finest Italian Potato Gnocchi with Cacio E Pepe Sauce is made in Italy and expertly prepared with no artificial colours and flavours.
name: Cacio E Pepe Gnocchi

description: COLES FINEST MUSHROOM RISOTTO 400G
ingredients: INGREDIENTS: Cooked Carnaroli Rice (40%) [Water, Rice], Water, Champignon Mushroom (13%), Extra Virgin Olive Oil, Nameko Mushroom (4.0%), Rice Flour, Porcini Mushroom (2.5%), Butter (Milk), PDO Grana Padano Cheese (2.0%) [Milk, Salt, Animal Rennet, Preservative (1105) (Egg)], PDO Asiago Cheese (2.0%) [Milk, Salt, Animal Rennet], Onion, Vegetable Broth Powder, Porcini Mushroom Powder (0.5%), Salt, Garlic, Parsley, Black Pepper.
long_description:
Coles Finest Italian Mushroom Risotto 400g


  • Rich and creamy
  • Classic Italian-style risotto
  • Ready in 6 mins


Indulge in the rich and creamy flavours of this Italian classic mushroom risotto.


Coles Finest Italian Mushroom Risotto features a delectable medley of mushrooms with al dente Carnaroli rice and savoury cheese. The combination of three mushroom varieties gives the dish a robust depth of flavour. Champignon mushrooms are used for their firm texture and subtle flavour, nameko mushrooms have a slightly sweet and fruity flavour with a distinctive nutty undertone and porcini mushrooms provide a meaty yet delicate almost woodsy flavour.


This delicious Coles Finest Italian Mushroom Risotto is ready to be cooked to perfection in only 6 minutes. Simply add it to a pan over medium high heat or microwave until piping hot. Then serve with some crusty bread and a simple green salad or enjoy as is. It's the perfect mid-week meal for two.


Coles Finest Italian Eggplant Parmigiana Bake is made in Italy and expertly prepared with no artificial colours and flavours.
name: Mushroom Risotto

long_description:
Coles Finest Luxury Lemon Sorbet 500 ml


  • Lemon sorbet
  • Delightfully refreshing
  • No artificial colours and flavours


Coles Finest brings you premium products to elevate any occasion. This delicious Coles Finest Luxury Lemon Sorbet is made with bright, vibrant and juicy lemons for the perfect refreshing treat. With a balance of sweetness and sour and velvety smooth texture, it's an irresistible taste experience and certified crowd-favourite.


Enjoy Coles Finest Luxury Lemon Sorbet in a waffle cone or cup. You can include a scoop of vanilla ice cream if you like as it pairs perfectly with the zingy lemon. Or whip up an easy but delicious dessert and add a handful of fresh raspberries for a pop of tartness and colour. Or for a quick and refreshing palate cleanser, scoop sorbet into some fancy glasses and top with a sprig of fresh mint.


Coles Finest Luxury Lemon Sorbet is also free from artificial colours and flavours and is suitable for vegetarians and vegans so it's the ideal treat everyone can enjoy.
name: Luxury Lemon Sorbet Tub

country_of_origin: Made in Australia from at least 99% Australian ingredients
description: COLES FINEST FLAT IRON SHARING STEAK WITH CHILLI AND GARLIC BUTTER
ingredients: INGREDIENTS: No Added Hormones Australian Beef (92%) (Beef Oyster Blade), Chilli and Garlic Cultured Butter (8%) [Cultured Butter (Cream (Milk), Cultures), Rehydrated Garlic (Water, Garlic, Acidity Regulator (Citric Acid)), Salt, Chilli, Dehydrated Red Capsicum, Processing Aid (Canola Oil)].
long_description:
Coles Finest Flat Iron Steak with Chilli and Garlic Butter approx. 420g


  • Australian beef
  • No added hormones
  • Perfect for sharing


Coles Finest brings you premium products to elevate any occasion. This Coles Finest Flat Iron Steak with Chilli and Garlic Butter is marbled and tender, perfect for creating gourmet meals at home.


Coles Finest cattle have no added hormones and are selected for exceptional taste and quality. This cut is juicy and full of flavour, paired with chilli and garlic cultured butter.

Ideal for sharing. Coles Finest Flat Iron Steak with Chilli and Garlic Butter cooks in less than 15 minutes on the barbeque or in a hot pan. Then pour over the melted butter and slice to serve. Delicious with a summer salad, or seasonal grilled veges.


This Coles Finest Flat Iron Steak with Chilli and Garlic Butter is also certified as a carbon neutral product against the Climate Active Carbon Neutral Standard for Products. Together with Aussie farmers, we're working to reduce our carbon footprint through best practice farming and emission reduction initiatives.
name: Flat Iron Sharing Steak With Chilli & Garlic Butter

description: DETTOL PVC ANTISEPTIC
ingredients: chloroxylenol 48mg/mL
long_description:
For use as a gentle antiseptic on the skin. Also suitable as a household disinfectant.

A house is not a home without a bottle of iconic Dettol Antiseptic and Disinfectant Liquid in your bathroom or kitchen cupboard!

This much-loved antiseptic cleanser Dettol product has been helping to fight germs and providing all-round family protection against germs for generations - and continues to care for your family today

Use Dettol Antiseptic and Disinfectant Liquid to cleanse and help protect against infection from minor skin cuts, scratches and insect bites. You can also use it as a household disinfectant on surfaces, and to freshen linen by adding it to your laundry rinse cycle.

  • Cleanses & helps protect against infection from cuts, scratches and insect bites

  • Kills germs on household surfaces

  • For use as a gentle antiseptic on the skin. Also suitable as a household disinfectant

  • To feel refreshed and really clean, 30ml of Dettol Liquid may be used safely in the bath

  • To freshen linen, nappies or other laundry items add 30ml of Dettol Liquid to the rinse cycle
name: Classic Antibacterial Disinfectant Liquid Solution

Dettol Disinfectant Surface Wipes

Dettol has been protecting families from germs for over 80 years and voted Most Trusted Brand for Household Cleaning (Winner Most Trusted Brand in Household Cleaning, 2024. Voted by Australians & New Zealanders, Readers Digest).
Get the trusted Dettol protection from germs in every wipe to help you keep a clean and hygienic home for your family.

- Made from 100% plant-based fibres (90% biodegrades in 60 days in active landfill conditions according to test ASTM D5511. Not suitable for composting conditions)
- Tough on kitchen grease, burnt-on food and kitchen dirt
- Kills 99.9% of germs (E. coli, Salmonella, S. aureus) including antibiotic resistant MRSA (Methicillin-Resistant Staphylococcus Aureus)
- Kills COVID-19 (SARS-CoV-2) virus on hard non-porous household surfaces, especially those frequently touched
- Kills flu viruses (Influenza A H1N1 & H3N2)

Biodegradable Wipes (90% biodegrades in 60 days in active landfill conditions according to test ASTM D5511. Not suitable for composting conditions).

description: DETTOL LAUNDRY SANITISER CONCENTRATED EUCALYPTUS 1.5L
long_description:
Dettol Concentrated Laundry Sanitiser removes 99.9% of bacteria** in both hot and cold water. Washing in detergent alone, and especially at low temperatures, may not effectively remove germs from your laundry. Ideal for dirty clothes such as sweaty sports gear, underwear, socks, work clothes, towels and linen that can harbour germs, Dettol Concentrated Laundry Sanitiser helps break the cycle of re-infection and cross-infection of laundry.

Dettol  Concentrated is a concentrated formula, so you can use less per dose*, whilst still leaving laundry hygienically clean and fresh.

*60mL dose  (top loader) & 25mL dose (front loader) per wash of Dettol Max Concentrated Laundry Sanitiser vs 240mL dose  (top loader) & 80 dose (front loader) of the Dettol or Pine O Cleen Antibacterial Laundry Sanitiser **E.coli, S.aureus
  • Ideal for dirty clothes such as sweaty sports gear, underwear, socks, work clothes, towels and linen that can harbour germs

  • Removes 99.9% of germs**

  • Leaves laundry hygienically clean and fresh

  • Concentrated formula with 50 washes per front loader dose and 18 washes per top loader dose

  • Natural Eucalyptus fragrance
name: Laundry Sanitiser Eucalyptus

description: DETTOL ANTIBACTERIAL WASHING MACHINE CLEANER 250ML
long_description:

long_description:

name: Good 7.0 Almond Creme Dark Blonde
description: GARNIER GOOD 7.0 ALMOND CREME DARK BLONDE 1 PACK
long_description:
GARNIER GOOD Permanent Hair Dye, Glossy hair colour, 100% Grey Hair Coverage, 8 weeks long-lasting colour, 90% natural origin, No Ammonia, Vegan Formula*, Cruelty Free, Almond Creme Dark Blonde 7.0.- CHANGE YOUR COLOUR FOR GOOD: 90% natural origin formula, without ammonia, 8 weeks intense glossy colour and 100% grey coverage. Experience a stress-free application with its non-dripping formula and cocooning fragrance. - DISCOVER THE NEW WAY TO COLOUR YOUR HAIR: Mix colourant & developer sachets directly in the tub until it transforms into a rich cream with delicate fragrance. Put on the gloves and apply with your hands. 95% agree that Good is easy to apply hair colour! - GLOSSY HAIR COLOUR GUARANTEED: Ultra caring formula, with fairly traded shea butter, nourishes the hair leaving it rejuvenated and healthy-looking. 94% agree it leaves natural, non-artificial shiny results. - CHOOSE YOUR SHADE: 7 multi-dimensional shades to choose from. Each works with your own tones and highlights, so you get natural looking colour that fits you perfectly, which is the best colour there is.*No animal derived ingredients

name: Fructis Curls Method Spray
description: GARNIER FRUCTIS CURLS METHOD SPRAY 150ML
long_description:
HAIR FACT: curly hair, with its fragile spiral structure, leaks moisture at every twist. With New Garnier Fructis Curls Method, get bouncy, defined curls.INGREDIENTS: Powered by [5%] Hyaluronic moisture complex + shea fatty acids. Hyaluronic Acid is produced through biotechnology & Shea is collected in Burkina Faso with our Solidarity Sourcing programme, creating positive social impact on local communities.RESULTS: Curls are visibly transformed: deeply moisturized, curls are healthy, defined, bouncy and elastic(3).CURLS METHOD APPROVED: NO sulfates, NO silicones, NO alcohol, NO mineral oil, NO artificial colourants. Tested dermatologically, Vegan Formula*, Cruelty-Free approved*No animal-derived ingredients or by-products.
  • 100H of moisture**Instrumental test after application of the shampoo + mask/ pre-shampoo + shampoo + mask.

  • Curls looks hydrated and defined for up to 48 hours*.*Consumer self-assessment, 74 subjects, 48 hrs after use.

  • Designed, tested and approved for all curl types (3).

  • NO SULFATE(4).NO SILICONE.NO ALCOHOL(5).NO MINERAL OILS.NO ARTIFICIAL COLOURANTS.

  • Vegan**No animal-derived ingredients or by-products.

long_description:

John West Tuna in Olive Oil Blend is a wholesome pantry staple that elevates everyday meals.
It's what John West rejects that makes John West the best.

- Versatile ingredient for many quick and easy recipes

High in protein and a source of Omega-3, this spicy tuna is perfect for adding excitement to your weekly meals. Stir it through spaghetti aglio e olio, toss into a warm grain bowl with roasted vegetables, or use it to build a spicy wrap with fresh slaw. It's also ideal in chilli tuna sushi or spooned over rice with sliced avocado and coriander. This 4-pack offers a convenient way to stock up.
It's what John West rejects that makes John West the best.

- High in protein and a source of Omega-3
- Great for spicy salads, pasta, wraps, or rice bowls
- No artificial colours, flavours, or preservatives

Free from artificial colours, flavours, and preservatives, John West Salmon in Springwater provide a simple yet delicious way to enjoy quality seafood. Whether at home, work, or on the go, this pantry staple ensures you always have a healthy meal option at your fingertips.

name: Protein+ Bowl Corn Bb Lime
description: JOHN WEST PROTEIN+ BOWL CORN- BB- LIME 170G
long_description:
Made with all-natural ingredients, John West Protein + Magnesium Tuna with Brown Rice, Chargrilled Corn, Black Beans, Lime & Chilli packs both goodness and flavour in one convenient ready-to-eat bowl. Rich in magnesium to support the functioning of nerves and muscles*, and high in protein; it's the perfect go-to lunch. Ready to eat straight from the bowl, this zesty spiced nutrient-rich tuna bowl is perfect for stocking up your pantry or work drawer for quick, easy, and healthy lunches.



Featured Benefits:

- 25% of your daily Magnesium needs^ to aid the functioning of nerves and muscles*

- 17g of Protein in every serve

- Purse seine wild-caught skipjack tuna from a Marine Stewardship Council (MSC) certified fishery - the highest standard in sustainability


^Recommended Dietary Intake (Average Adult).

*When eaten as part of a healthy eating plan.

Enjoy the smooth, savoury taste of John West Pink Salmon in Olive Oil. Each 95g can features wild-caught Alaskan pink salmon, gently infused with olive oil for a rich, flaky texture and delicate flavour. Use it in a quinoa and avocado salad with lemon vinaigrette, pile it into a toasted sandwich with fresh herbs and capers, or toss it into a brown rice bowl with edamame and roasted veggies. It's also great as a post-gym snack with crackers or cucumber slices.
It's what John West rejects that makes John West the best.

- Perfect in salads, sandwiches, or grain bowls
- No artificial colours, flavours, or preservatives

name: Yellowfin Tuna Springwater
description: JOHN WEST YELLOWFIN TUNA SPRINGWATER 90G
long_description:
Enjoy the naturally mild, slightly sweet flavour of John West Yellowfin Tuna in Springwater 90g, a premium tuna with a firm yet delicate texture. Responsibly sourced and carefully packed in pure springwater, this tuna lets the natural taste shine, making it an excellent choice for those who prefer a clean and simple protein option.

With high-quality protein and naturally occurring omega-3s, this versatile tuna supports a balanced diet while delivering delicious convenience. Its light, fresh taste makes it ideal for a variety of meals - flaked over a garden salad, mixed into a wholesome wrap, or paired with brown rice and steamed greens for a nourishing lunch. For a quick, satisfying snack, enjoy it straight from the can with a squeeze of lemon and a sprinkle of black pepper. However you serve it, John West Yellowfin Tuna in Springwater offers a pure and simple way to enjoy premium seafood.
It's what John West rejects that makes John West the best.

- Naturally rich in protein and omega-3s
- Responsibly sourced premium Yellowfin tuna
- Packed in pure springwater for a light, clean taste
- Perfect for salads, sandwiches, wraps, or straight from the can

long_description:

This premium Yellowfin tuna is infused with just the right amount of chilli, delivering a delicious kick while maintaining its naturally mild, slightly sweet taste and firm texture.

Packed with high-quality protein and omega-3s, it's a satisfying and nutritious choice that's perfect for quick, flavourful meals. Enjoy it stirred through pasta with cherry tomatoes and fresh basil, spooned over crisp tacos with avocado and lime, or simply straight from the can for a spicy protein boost. Whether you're adding excitement to a simple dish or craving a fiery snack, John West Yellowfin Tuna Chilli brings the heat with every bite.
It's what John West rejects that makes John West the best.

- High in protein and omega-3
- Responsibly sourced premium Yellowfin tuna
- Infused with just the right amount of chilli for a flavourful kick
- Perfect for pasta, tacos, rice bowls, or straight from the can

name: Tuna Mild Indian Curry
description: JOHN WEST TUNA MILD INDIAN CURRY 95 GRAM
long_description:
John West Tuna with Mild Indian Curry brings a taste of India to your lunchbox with tender flaked tuna in a mildly spiced curry sauce. This tuna is high in protein and Omega-3, offering both nutrition and flavour in one convenient can. Try it in a wholemeal wrap with baby spinach and cucumber raita, spooned over basmati rice with peas, or stirred through couscous with coriander and toasted almonds. The mild curry flavour is aromatic and comforting, making it a family-friendly option.
It's what John West rejects that makes John West the best.

- High in protein and a source of Omega-3 fatty acids
- Ready-to-eat, perfect for wraps, rice bowls, or warm salads
- No artificial colours, flavours, or preservatives

long_description:

Packed with high-quality protein and omega-3 fatty acids our MSC certified Wild Caught salmon is expertly sourced from the pristine Alaskan waters and wilderness. The versatility of John West's 95g can makes it perfect for any occasion, whether it's a quick, delicious and energising lunch, on-the-go high in protein snack at the gym or a light zesty meal throughout the day.
As the leaders in responsibly sourced seafood, John West prides itself on sourcing MSC certified wild-caught Alaskan pink salmon.
It's what John West rejects that makes John West the best.

- Skinless & boneless
- High in protein
- High source of Omega-3
ingredients: Salmon (*fish*) (60%), vegetable oil, water, lime juice (4%), ginger (3%), chilli (2.5%), salt.

long_description:
John West Salmon Slices Smoked Flavour 125g brings the bold, smoky taste of traditionally smoked salmon to your pantry in a convenient, ready-to-eat format. Packed in oil to lock in moisture and depth of flavour, these slices are perfect for quick and tasty meals at home or on the go. Add them to a creamy pasta with capers and dill, layer into a toasted sandwich with Swiss cheese and rocket, or flake over a grain bowl with quinoa, roasted veggies and tahini dressing. They're also great on a charcuterie or grazing board served with crackers, pickles and soft cheeses.
It's what John West rejects that makes John West the best.

- High in protein and rich in Omega-3
- Delicious in salads, pasta, toasties or grazing boards
- No artificial preservatives or added colours

name: Anchovies Fillets in Olive Oil
description: JOHN WEST ANCHOVY FILLETS IN OLIVE OIL 45G
long_description:
John West Anchovies in Olive Oil are a flavour-packed staple for every home cook. These salt-cured anchovy fillets are packed in smooth olive oil to preserve their bold, savoury flavour and tender texture. Known for their rich umami profile, anchovies are perfect for adding depth to pasta sauces, pizza, dressings, or Mediterranean dishes. Just a few fillets can transform your recipes, delivering a punch of flavour with minimal effort. They're also a tasty snack on their own or with crackers and cheese. Free from artificial colours, flavours, or preservatives, John West Anchovies offer a natural, high-quality ingredient for adventurous home cooks.
It's what John West rejects that makes John West the best.

- No artificial colours, flavours, or preservatives
- Bold, savoury flavour ideal for enhancing recipes
- Pantry staple for Mediterranean-inspired dishes
ingredients: Salted anchovies (*fish*) (60%) (anchovy fillets, salt), olive oil (40%).

name: Salmon Tempters Lemon Cracked Pepper
description: JOHN WEST SALMON LEMON CRACKED PEPPER 95 GRAM
long_description:
John West Salmon Lemon & Cracked Pepper 95g delivers a burst of flavour with wild-caught salmon flaked and seasoned to perfection. The zesty citrus of lemon pairs beautifully with the warmth of cracked black pepper, enhancing the natural taste of premium salmon. Packed in a handy single-serve can, it's a convenient option for work lunches, picnics or snacks on the go. High in protein and a natural source of Omega-3, it supports a healthy, balanced diet without compromising on taste. Try it tossed through a garden salad, layered into a wholegrain wrap with avocado and rocket, or spooned onto sourdough crackers with cottage cheese for a quick bite. Free from artificial colours or preservatives, John West Salmon Lemon & Cracked Pepper is a deliciously simple way to enjoy nutritious seafood any time, anywhere.
It's what John West rejects that makes John West the best.

- High in protein and rich in Omega-3
- Convenient single-serve tin
- Delicious in wraps, salads, sandwiches, or on crackers
ingredients: Salmon (*fish*) (61%), Lemon & cracked pepper (39%) (water, vegetable oil, salt, lime, food acid (citric), cracked pepper, lemon juice powder, colour (paprika oleoresins), spices).

long_description:
John West Salmon Bowl with Coconut Lime Chilli and Rice 170g offers an exotic blend of flavours featuring tender salmon, creamy coconut, zesty lime, and a hint of chilli for a unique taste experience. High in protein and Omega-3 fatty acids, this bowl is a nutritious option for busy individuals. Ready to eat straight from the pack, it's perfect for quick lunches or dinners. The combination of ingredients creates a delightful mix of textures and flavours that make each bite enjoyable.



It's what John West rejects that makes John West the best.


High in protein and Omega-3


- Convenient ready-to-eat meal


- No artificial colours or preservatives

It's what John West rejects that makes John West the best.

- Great for salads, pasta, or as a light meal
- No artificial colours, flavours, or preservatives

name: Mild & Light Olive Oil
description: LA ESPANOLA MILD & LIGHT OLIVE OIL 500ML
long_description:
Expertly crafted to perform at high temperatures, our La Espanols Light Olive Oil is especially suited for deep-frying and baking. A lighter taste ensures this oil will complement but not overpower the flavors of your dish.

Perfect for high-heat cooking, this light-flavored La Espanola olive oil boasts an impressive smoke point of 240°C, making it ideal for frying, searing, and deep-frying without breaking down or producing unwanted flavors. Its exceptional stability means you can reuse it up to 24 times when frying, offering both outstanding performance and excellent value while maintaining quality throughout multiple uses.

The delightfully delicate flavors of our La Espanola Light Olive Oil are less pungent and bitter than other oils. A smooth, subtle fruitiness lends itself perfectly to your recipes, adding the benefits and character of olive oil without stealing the show. Specially suitable for baking due to its mild flavour.
  • 100% Spanish origin

  • For high heat cooking & baking

  • Light and subtle flavour

  • Smoke point 240C
ingredients: Refined olive oil and virgin olive oil.

name: Olive Oil
description: LA ESPANOLA OLIVE OIL 3.78L
long_description:
La Espanola Olive Oil is superbly suited for grilling and roasting due to its ability to withstand high temperatures without losing any of its natural goodness. Its smooth and subtle flavor makes our La Espanola Olive Oil a versatile addition to your cooking routine.

Characterized by mild flavor and aroma, La Espanola Olive Oil offers a smooth blend of pleasant smoothness, fruit, and spice. Well-balanced and easygoing, it will gently enrich and complement the flavors of your dishes.

This delicate blend enables home chefs to obtain the optimal taste and texture when cooking. While extra virgin olive oil is typically used as a dressing, or as finishing touch to cooked dishes, La Espanola Olive Oil is an essential cooking ingredient in any kitchen, enhancing home-cooked meals with flavor, texture, and aroma.
  • 100% Spanish origin

  • Versatility

  • Subtle and smooth flavour

  • High heat cooking, frying, baking, grilling

name: Extra Virgin Olive Oil
description: LA ESPANOLA EXTRA VIRGIN OLIVE OIL 3.78L
long_description:
A real fruit juice made exclusively from Spanish olives, our La Espanola Extra Virgin Olive Oil belongs to the highest quality category in the industry. By prioritizing fresh ingredients throughout the journey from tree to table, we preserve the oil's beautiful taste.

Bold and beautiful, La Espanola Extra Virgin Olive Oil adds a full and fruity flavor and aroma to your meal. With a slight peppery zest and pleasant bitterness, La Espanola Extra Virgin Olive Oil is delicately spiced and pungent, lingering on the tongue in a balanced finish.

The benefits of consuming La Espanola Extra Virgin Olive Oil are manifold. Studies have linked extra virgin olive oil to improved cardio-vascular health and reduced blood pressure. What's more, the unique taste of extra virgin olive oils elevates the flavor profile of a whole host of dishes and has long been a staple ingredient of Mediterranean cuisine.
  • 100% Spanish origin

  • First cold extraction

  • For dipping & seasoning

  • Medium flavour

  • Smoke point 160C

description: LA ESPANOLA EXTRA VIRGIN OLIVE OIL 1 LITRE
long_description:
A real fruit juice made exclusively from Spanish olives, our La Espanola Extra Virgin Olive Oil belongs to the highest quality category in the industry. By prioritizing fresh ingredients throughout the journey from tree to table, we preserve the oil's beautiful taste.

Bold and beautiful, La Espanola Extra Virgin Olive Oil adds a full and fruity flavor and aroma to your meal. With a slight peppery zest and pleasant bitterness, La Espanola Extra Virgin Olive Oil is delicately spiced and pungent, lingering on the tongue in a balanced finish.

The benefits of consuming La Espanola Extra Virgin Olive Oil are manifold. Studies have linked extra virgin olive oil to improved cardio-vascular health and reduced blood pressure. What's more, the unique taste of extra virgin olive oils elevates the flavor profile of a whole host of dishes and has long been a staple ingredient of Mediterranean cuisine.
  • 100% Spanish origin

  • First cold extraction

  • For dipping & seasoning

  • Medium flavour

  • Smoke point 160C

name: Mild & Light Olive Oil
description: LA ESPANOLA MILD & LIGHT OLIVE OIL 1 LITRE
long_description:
Expertly crafted to perform at high temperatures, our La Espanols Light Olive Oil is especially suited for deep-frying and baking. A lighter taste ensures this oil will complement but not overpower the flavors of your dish.

Perfect for high-heat cooking, this light-flavored La Espanola olive oil boasts an impressive smoke point of 240°C, making it ideal for frying, searing, and deep-frying without breaking down or producing unwanted flavors. Its exceptional stability means you can reuse it up to 24 times when frying, offering both outstanding performance and excellent value while maintaining quality throughout multiple uses.

The delightfully delicate flavors of our La Espanola Light Olive Oil are less pungent and bitter than other oils. A smooth, subtle fruitiness lends itself perfectly to your recipes, adding the benefits and character of olive oil without stealing the show. Specially suitable for baking due to its mild flavour.
  • 100% Spanish origin

  • For high heat cooking & baking

  • Light and subtle flavour

  • Smoke point 240C
ingredients: Refined olive oil and virgin olive oil.

name: Olive Oil Mild Flavour
description: LA ESPANOLA OLIVE OIL MILD FLAVOUR 1 LITRE
long_description:
Discover the versatility of La Espanola Mild Extra Virgin Olive Oil, specially crafted for those who love the quality and health benefits of extra virgin olive oil but prefer a gentler, more subtle flavor profile.
Made from 100% Spanish olives, including the prized Arbequina variety known for its naturally smooth character, this oil delivers all the excellence of extra virgin quality with a soft, delicate taste that never overpowers your dishes.

Its mild and balanced flavor makes it exceptionally versatile in the kitchen, adapting seamlessly to countless recipes and preparations. Unlike more robust olive oils, this gentle expression allows other ingredients to shine while still providing the nutritional benefits and quality you expect from authentic Extra Virgin Olive Oil.

Perfect for those who don't want to compromise on using extra virgin olive oil but prefer the flavor to remain in the background. It's ideal for baking, delicate sauces, mayonnaise, desserts, and any preparation where you want the health advantages of olive oil without a pronounced olive taste.
  • 100% Spanish origin

  • Mild and delicate taste

  • Never overpowers your dishes

  • Ideal for baking and sauces

name: Squeeze Evoo
description: LA ESPANOLA SQUEEZE EVOO 500ML
long_description:
Bring professional culinary precision to your home kitchen with our innovative Squeeze bottle format for La Espanola Extra Virgin Olive Oil, designed to put chef-quality control in your hands.

Crafted exclusively from Spanish Picual olives grown in Jaen - the world's leading olive oil producing region, home to over 60 million olive trees - this 100% Spanish Extra Virgin Olive Oil delivers an authentic, powerful flavor experience.

The bold, bitter & spicy character of Picual olives makes this oil perfect for dressing and finishing dishes. Drizzle it over salads, bruschetta, grilled vegetables, or fresh tomatoes to add depth and intensity that transforms simple ingredients into extraordinary creations.

Our new squeeze bottle gives you complete control with every pour. The adjustable cap allows precise dosing, preventing waste and ensuring you add exactly the right amount to each dish.
  • Squeeze to serve

  • Bold flavour

  • 100% Spanish origin

  • Single variety Picual olives

  • The bottle contains 50% recycled plastic

name: Organic Extra Virgin Olive Oil
description: LA ESPANOLA ORGANIC EXTRA VIRGIN OLIVE OIL 1 LITRE
long_description:
Experience the pure essence of Spanish olive oil with our La Espanola Organic Extra Virgin Olive Oil, crafted with respect for both tradition and the environment. Made from 100% Spanish organic olives, this oil represents our commitment to sustainable practices and exceptional quality.

First cold pressed, this oil preserves all the natural properties and nutrients of the olive, ensuring you enjoy the full spectrum of flavors and health benefits that make Mediterranean cuisine so remarkable. Produced using organic farming standards La Espanola Organic Extra Virgin Olive Oil is CAAE certified and free of pesticides and preservatives.

One of the first things you'll notice when you taste La Espanola organic extra virgin olive oil is the peppery fragrance and wild fruit notes. Intense in flavor, it's the perfect olive for both connoisseurs and those curious to experience the jewel in the crown of Mediterranean cuisine.

La Espanola Organic Extra Virgin Olive Oil features notes of pepper and wild fruit to create a perfect blend of spice and mellow bitterness with a long finish, it is fresh, aromatic, and extremely well-balanced.

Its flavor profile makes it remarkably versatile in the kitchen. Whether you're cooking at low or high temperatures (with a smoke point of 160°C) or preparing fresh dressings and marinades, this oil adapts beautifully to any culinary application.
  • Free of pesticides and preservatives

  • First cold pressed

  • Well-balanced flavour

  • Versatile for high heat and low heat cooking, as well as dressings

  • Smoke point 160C

name: Extra Virgin Olive Oil Spray
description: LA ESPANOLA EXTRA VIRGIN OLIVE OIL SPRAY 200ML
long_description:
Discover the perfect way to apply extra virgin olive oil with precision and efficiency. Our La Espanola extra virgin olive oil spray format is specifically designed to distribute oil evenly across food surfaces, ensuring complete coverage with a fine, uniform layer while minimizing waste.

Ideal for dressing salads, coating pans, and preparing baking trays, this spray bottle delivers exactly the amount you need, exactly where you need it. Whether you're lightly misting vegetables before roasting or evenly covering a skillet, you'll achieve professional results with ease.

Inside is La Espanola Extra Virgin Olive Oil, Spain's oldest olive oil brand - a name synonymous with quality, tradition, and authenticity since its founding. Every spray delivers the fresh and genuine flavor that has made La Espanola a trusted choice for years.

The multi-function cap offers three dispensing modes depending on the pressure applied: a gentle drip for precise drops, a steady stream for pouring, or a fine spray mist for even coverage. This compressed air system contains no aerosols or propellants, making it a healthier and a more environmentally conscious choice.
  • 3-in-1 dispensing cap: drip, stream, or spray

  • Spray & cook

  • Aerosol free

  • 100% Spanish origin

name: Extra Virgin Olive Oil
description: LA ESPANOLA EXTRA VIRGIN OLIVE OIL 4 LITRE
long_description:
A real fruit juice made exclusively from Spanish olives, our La Espanola Extra Virgin Olive Oil belongs to the highest quality category in the industry. By prioritizing fresh ingredients throughout the journey from tree to table, we preserve the oil's beautiful taste.

Bold and beautiful, La Espanola Extra Virgin Olive Oil adds a full and fruity flavor and aroma to your meal. With a slight peppery zest and pleasant bitterness, La Espanola Extra Virgin Olive Oil is delicately spiced and pungent, lingering on the tongue in a balanced finish.

The benefits of consuming La Espanola Extra Virgin Olive Oil are manifold. Studies have linked extra virgin olive oil to improved cardio-vascular health and reduced blood pressure. What's more, the unique taste of extra virgin olive oils elevates the flavor profile of a whole host of dishes and has long been a staple ingredient of Mediterranean cuisine.
  • 100% Spanish origin

  • First cold extraction

  • For dipping & seasoning

  • Medium flavour

  • Smoke point 160C

name: Hojiblanca Evoo 25th Anniversary
description: LA ESPANOLA HOJIBLANCA EVOO 25TH ANNIVERSARY 1L
long_description:
Celebrate a quarter-century of excellence with our exclusive 25th Anniversary La Espanola Extra Virgin Olive Oil, a tribute to our journey bringing authentic Spanish flavors to Australia.

This exceptional single-varietal olive oil is crafted exclusively from Hojiblanca olives, known for producing oils with a delicate and balanced character. 100% Spanish in origin, every drop captures the essence of Spain's rich olive-growing heritage.

Presented in an elegant 1L round tin adorned with traditional Spanish tile-inspired designs, this package is as beautiful as the oil inside.

With its light and fruity profile, this La Espanola Hojiblanca Extra Virgin Olive Oil offers a gentle, refined taste. Its unique flavor adds a touch of delicacy to any dish, from fresh salads and vegetables to fish, chicken, and even desserts.
  • 100% Spanish origin

  • Single variety made with only Hojiblanca olives

  • Light & fruity taste

  • Its unique flavour ads a touch of delicacy to any dish

name: Iced Tea Peach No Sugar Mini Cans 240ml
description: LIPTON ICED TEA 6X240ML:PEACH NO SUGAR:.:6 PACK
long_description:
Our favourite ice tea just got better with Lipton No Sugar Peach Ice Tea, now available in cans.

Quench your thirst and experience refreshment with a Peach Lipton Ice Tea flavour hit that has absolutely no sugar with Lipton No Sugar Peach Ice Tea. Lipton No Sugar Peach Ice Tea is made with quality black Lipton Tea for a taste that will delight your taste buds and leave you feeling cool and refreshed. A refreshing and delicious drink, full of flavour that you can drink all day with no worries about sugar.

No Sugar Peach flavoured Lipton Ice Tea contains no artificial colours, no preservatives and absolutely no sugar. Available in a convenient 6 pack of 240ml slim line cans.

Lipton No Sugar Peach Ice Tea is perfect enjoyed on its own and any time of the day, but is also a great addition to all kinds of meals. We recommend matching it with spicy food, Asian food, salads and sandwiches - you can't go wrong.

Lipton have been providing tea to over 150 counties since 1880 and never compromise on quality. Only the best tea leaves go into Lipton Ice Tea. All tea leaves are sourced from around the world and are expertly blended so you can enjoy a premium quality experience. So, reward yourself with the fresh, delicious taste that makes iced tea a great choice. No Sugar, 100% taste!
  • No Sugar

  • No Artificial Colours

  • No Preservatives

  • Made from real Lipton Tea Leaves

  • Rainforrest Alliance Certified: Sustainably sourced tea leaves.

name: Ice Tea No Sugar Peach Tea Iced Tea Bottle
description: LIPTON ICE DRINK TEA:PEACH NO SUGAR 500 ML
long_description:
Our favourite ice tea just got better with Lipton No Sugar Peach Ice Tea, the same great Lipton Ice Tea taste now with no sugar.

Get ready for a delicious Peach Lipton Ice Tea flavour hit that has absolutely no sugar with Lipton No Sugar Peach Ice Tea.

Lipton No Sugar Peach Ice Tea is made with quality black Lipton Tea for a taste that will delight your taste buds and leave you feeling cool and refreshed. A refreshing and delicious drink, full of flavour that you can drink all day with no worries about sugar.

No Sugar Peach flavoured Lipton Ice Tea contains no artificial colours, no preservatives and absolutely no sugar. The convenient 500mL bottle size is also perfect for on the go occasions and or when you're looking for a single serve moment.

Lipton No Sugar Peach Ice Tea is perfect enjoyed on its own and any time of the day, but is also a great addition to all kinds of meals. We recommend matching it with spicy food, Asian food, salads and sandwiches - you can't go wrong.

Lipton have been providing tea to over 150 counties since 1880 and never compromise on quality. Only the best tea leaves go into Lipton Ice Tea. All tea leaves are sourced from around the world and are expertly blended so you can enjoy a premium quality experience. So, reward yourself with the fresh, delicious taste that makes iced tea a great choice. No Sugar, 100% taste!
  • 100% Taste, No Sugar

  • Made from real quality Lipton tea leaves

  • No artificial colours and no preservatives

  • Deliciously refreshing

The 1.5L multi serve bottle is also the perfect size for sharing with friends and family.

So, reward yourself with the fresh, delicious taste that makes iced tea a great choice. No Sugar, 100% taste!

name: Tea Bags Decaf
description: LIPTON TEA BAGS DECAF 50 PACK
long_description:
Lipton Decaffeinated Tea tastes like a real tea because we use a special process to decaffeinate our tea which maintains the full flavour & aroma inherent in the leaf. Lipton Decaffeinated tea is bright in colour & has a rich, smooth flavour. The same delicious flavour of Lipton tea without the caffeine makes this product ideal for a night time cuppa and for all those that are seeking to limit their caffeine intake. A refreshing taste for a feed good moment. At Lipton we recognise the importance of sustainability in the growth of our tea. With over 100 years of experience our approach to sustainability is holistic. We looked in detail at the social, environmental and economic aspects of tea production carrying out our own work and working with Rainforest Alliance to ensure all our tea is sourced sustainably. Tea was originally an expensive drink, enjoyed exclusively by the wealthy. Thomas Lipton was a man on a mission - to share his passion for tea around the world. He believed that everyone deserved high quality, great tasting cup of tea. And over 120 years later, that belief is still what drives us - inspiring more flavours, more varieties and more love than ever before. All our tea bags are 100% sustainably sourced, which translates into ensuring decent wages for tea farmers around the world together with access to quality housing, education and medical care. Your fresh tea is their brighter future. Visit our website to see our full range of flavours such as extra strong, English breakfast, Quality Black, Herbal, Green and many more.
  • We use a special process to decaffeinate our tea which maintains the full flavour & aroma inherent in the leaf.

  • Bright in colour & has a rich, smooth flavour.

  • A great alternative if you are watching your caffeine intake.

  • Great for an authentic pot of tea

  • Pour freshly boiled water over a tasty Bushells teabag. Watch the brew turn rich and dark (dunk up and down occasionally to get that full flavour)

  • We have worked closely with the Rainforest Alliance to holistically approach sustainability and the welfare of all farm workers.

name: English Breakfast Black Tea Bags
description: LIPTON ENGLISH BREAKFAST TEA 100 PACK
long_description:
Say hello to the mornings and awaken your senses with this deliciously satisfying blend of rich and robust tea leaves grown in the central hills of Ceylon.

Made with top sun-ripened tea leaves freshly picked for their brightening, bold and aromatic flavour for a thick, sweet brew.

A sunny sip of a full bodied tea to awaken you to what the world has to offer.

At the heart of the rich delicious taste of English Breakfast are our sun-ripened tea leaves picked by our passionate farmers. Their work is at the root of every cup of Lipton tea. That's why we've already trained over 50,000 farmers in Kenya in partnership with Rainforest Alliance. We're committed to equipping our farmers with the tools and resources they need to help create a better life for themselves, their families and their wider communities.

Here's a bright idea
Kick-start your day with the delicious, bold taste of our English Breakfast Tea

Taste The Sunshine Goodness
Our tea is a harmonious blend of quality tea leaves from Kenya and other countries¹. In our Kenyan tea gardens, we work closely with nature. Our irrigation system is the rain. The gentle Kenyan wind breezes over our tea leaves for perfection. Our tea gardens receive sunshine all year long and our leaves soak up every bit of sunshine goodness. Lipton combines the best of nature to give you that signature, rich natural taste and aroma in every single cup.
¹The other sources of this tea blend include Vietnam, Tanzania, Indonesia and Malawi.

Don't just default to the usual, enjoy the superior taste of fresh-brewed Lipton tea. It's the Lipton Difference, so take a sip and let our tea brighten your day. name: 98% Sugar Free Caramel Latte Coffee Sachets
description: NESCAFE 98% SUGAR FREE CARAMEL LATTE COFFEE SACHETS 10 PACK
long_description:
What's something smooth, rich and simply deLIGHTful? Introducing, NESCAFE 98% SUGAR FREE CARAMEL LATTE, the perfect combo of smooth coffee, rich caramel flavour and a layer of silky froth. With a delectable layer of velvety froth and quality coffee, enjoy a cafe style creamy caramel latte and treat yourself at any time in the comfort of your own home. All you need to do is add hot water and give it a good stir. The result is a delightfully creamy coffee that you can enjoy from the first to the last sip. So whatever you're up to, Now's good for a deliciously creamy NESCAFE 98% SUGAR FREE CARAMEL LATTE. NESCAFE. Make Your World.

name: Blend 43 Smooth & Creamy Instant Coffee
description: NESCAFE BLEND 43 SMOOTH & CREAMY INSTANT COFFEE 140G
long_description:
Every cup you drink can make a difference. Escape on an aromatic journey with this silky smooth roast of NESCAFE Blend 43. Each cup is delicate in flavour, topped with a velvety barista-inspired layer of golden crema. Through using 100% responsibly sourced coffee beans in NESCAFE Blend 43, we are making a difference for coffee farmers, helping to improve their lands and livelihoods. We are making a difference by sourcing 100% renewable electricity and using coffee grounds left over from the brewing process to help power our NESCAFE factory in Gympie, Queensland. What makes a NESCAFE Blend 43 cup of coffee more enjoyable is that every time you enjoy a cup, you are not just enjoying your favourite cup of coffee, you are also making a difference.
  • Intensity score: 3 (Smooth Roast)

  • Taste Notes: Smooth & Mellow

  • Preparation: A 140g jar is recyclable and makes approx. 29 cups of coffee based on 1.7g per cup.

  • The perfect blend of coffee for your daily coffee moment.
ingredients: 100% Natural Coffee Beans. Soluble Coffee.
country_of_origin: Packed in Australia from Imported Ingredients

name: Dolce Gusto Ristretto Ardenza Coffee Capsules
description: NESCAFE DOLCE GUSTO RISTRETTO ARDENZA COFFEE CAPSULES 16 PACK
long_description:
One of our most intense coffee, Ristretto Ardenza is short yet remarkably powerful. You will be surprised by the spicy notes and peppery notes released under its dense, dark golden crema top. This dark roast is the perfect blend of premium Arabica complemented with Robusta.

The box contains 16 capsules designed for NESCAFÉ DOLCE GUSTO capsule coffee machines for you to prepare 16 cups of Ristretto Ardenza. Simply slide your Ristretto Ardenza capsule into your NESCAFÉ DOLCE GUSTO machine.

Our expertise is creating great-looking, great-tasting coffee.

The team at NESCAFÉ DOLCE GUSTO has joined forces with TerraCycle, to collect and recycle your used capsules, preventing them from ending up in landfill and giving the capsule materials a second life!
ingredients: Ingredients: [Dark Capsule] Roast & Ground Coffee

name: B43 Coffee Decaf
description: NESCAFE B43 COFFEE DECAF 150G
long_description: Every cup you drink can make a difference. When you want a brew without the buzz, this bold & smooth roast is the perfect choice. Pure water is used to gently remove the caffeine, while the medium roast gives it a rich flavour and aroma. A cup of NESCAFE Blend 43 Decaf contains no more than 5mg of caffeine per 1.7g serve. Through using 100% responsibly sourced coffee beans in NESCAFE Blend 43, we are making a difference for coffee farmers, helping to improve their lands and livelihoods. We are making a difference by sourcing 100% renewable electricity and using coffee grounds left over from the brewing process to help power our NESCAFE factory in Gympie, Queensland. What makes a NESCAFE Blend 43 cup of coffee more enjoyable is that every time you enjoy a cup, you are not just enjoying your favourite cup of coffee, you are also making a difference.
ingredients: 100% Natural Coffee Beans. Decaffeinated Soluble Coffee. Contains Not More Than 5mg Caffeine Per 1.7g Serve

A blend of 100% responsibly sourced Robusta and Arabica coffee beans that have been roasted darker to deliver an extra-rich, full-bodied taste. Perfect for those who prefer a more full-bodied coffee. Through using 100% responsibly sourced coffee beans in NESCAFE Blend 43, we are making a difference for coffee farmers, helping to improve their lands and livelihoods. We are making a difference by sourcing 100% renewable electricity and using coffee grounds left over from the brewing process to help power our NESCAFE factory in Gympie, Queensland. What makes a NESCAFE Blend 43 cup of coffee more enjoyable is that every time you enjoy a cup, you are not just enjoying your favourite cup of coffee, you are also making a difference.

name: Espresso Coffee Concentrate Black
description: NESCAFE ESPRESSO COFFEE CONCENTRATE BLACK 500ML
long_description:
This concentrated liquid coffee lets you make your own delicious iced or hot coffees at home in an instant. We take rich high quality roasted coffee, concentrate under pressure at a high temperature, to naturally lock-in the same great taste, that you love about freshly made coffee from a cafe. Using a rich Arabica blend you can turn any cold glass of milk in the ultimate iced coffee.
  • One bottle makes up to 10 serves. Also available in Sweet Vanilla & Rich Caramel flavours. To recycle the bottle and cap follow the recycling instructions on the back of the bottle.

  • Pour 250ml of cold milk into a glass, shake bottle well, add 2-3 tablespoons (50ml) of concentrate to the milk, stir, add ice and enjoy!

  • It has a rich and smooth taste like a great coffee from your local cafe

  • It is convenient as it dissolves in cold liquid in seconds, no machine is required

  • It is customisable and versatile so you can play barista at home
ingredients: Water, Soluble Coffee (8.3%), Acidity Regulator (Sodium Bicarbonate).

long_description:
Boost those dull days with a coffee that packs a punch. The NESCAFE Double Shot Latte* is the perfect combination of strong coffee flavour, smooth creamy texture and silky froth. Add an extra kick in your step and elevate your cafe moment from home. All you need to do is add hot water and give it a good stir. The result is a delightfully creamy coffee that you can enjoy from the first to the last sip. So whatever you're up to, Now's good for a deliciously creamy NESCAFE Double Shot Latte*. If you love this, try the rest of our delicious range.*Twice the amount of coffee per serve than our standard NESCAFE Latte
  • Available in 10 sachets per pack.

  • We go beyond the cup. We're committed to sustainable sourcing and packaging so our coffee not only tastes good but also does good. Our coffee beans are roasted right here in Australia and 100% sustainably sourced.

  • We've also made the commitment to convert all of our packaging to 100% recyclable by 2025.

name: Espresso Coffee Concentrate Vanilla
description: NESCAFE ESPRESSO COFFEE CONCENTRATE VANILLA 500ML
long_description:
This concentrated liquid coffee lets you make your own delicious iced or hot coffees at home in an instant. We take rich high quality roasted coffee, concentrate under pressure at a high temperature, to naturally lock-in the same great taste, that you love about freshly made coffee from a cafe. We have also added a vanilla flavour so you can create an indulgent coffee. Using a rich Arabica blend you can turn any cold glass of milk in the ultimate vanilla iced coffee.
  • One bottle makes up to 10 serves. Also available in Black & Rich Caramel flavour. To recycle the bottle and cap follow the recycling instructions on the back of the bottle.

  • Pour 250ml of cold milk into a glass, shake bottle well, add 2-3 tablespoons (50ml) of concentrate to the milk, stir, add ice and enjoy!

  • It has a rich and smooth taste like a great coffee from your local cafe

  • It is convenient as it dissolves in cold liquid in seconds, no machine is required

  • It is customisable and versatile so you can play barista at home
ingredients: Water, Sugar, Soluble Coffee (8.3%), Acidity Regulator (Sodium Bicarbonate), Flavour.

name: Dolce Gusto Cappuccino Coffee Capsules
description: NESCAFE DOLCE GUSTO CAPPUCCINO COFFEE CAPSULES 16 PACK
long_description: Discover NESCAFE DOLCE GUSTO Cappuccino. Our talented coffee creators have perfected the NESCAFE DOLCE GUSTO Cappuccino two capsule recipe: one capsule for the espresso, an Italian-style dark roast of an Arabica blend from South America and Robusta from Vietnam, and one capsule for the whole milk with a touch of sugar. The deep taste of espresso, combined with velvety foam and textured milk, make this drink a great pleasure.The box contains 16 capsules (8 coffee capsules and 8 milk capsules) designed for NESCAFE DOLCE GUSTO capsule coffee machines for you to prepare 8 cups of Cappuccino. Simply slide your Cappuccino coffee pod into your NESCAFE DOLCE GUSTO machine to have this delicious drink within minutes. Our expertise is creating great-looking, great-tasting coffee. The team at NESCAFE DOLCE GUSTO has joined forces with TerraCycle, to collect and recycle your used capsules, preventing them from ending up in landfill and giving the capsule materials a second life!

name: Blend 43 Instant Coffee
description: NESCAFE BLEND 43 INSTANT COFFEE 50G
long_description:
Every cup you drink can make a difference. To create the perfect cup of Blend 43 we take care & craft in individually roasting coffee beans, bringing out their unique flavour & aroma. The perfect blend, always bold and now even smoother. At NESCAFE, we work to source coffee responsibly. It means that our coffee is traceable to the group of farms where it was grown in accordance with sustainability standards from external programmes, helping to improve farmers lands and livelihoods. We are making a difference by sourcing 100% renewable electricity and using coffee grounds left over from the brewing process to help power our NESCAFE factory in Gympie, Queensland. What makes a NESCAFE Blend 43 cup of coffee more enjoyable is that every time you enjoy a cup, you are not just enjoying your favourite cup of coffee, you are also making a difference.
  • Intensity Score: 5 (Medium Roast)

  • Taste Notes: Bold & Smooth

  • Preparation: A 50g Jar is recyclable and makes approx. 29 cups of coffee based on 1.7g per cup.

  • The perfect blend of coffee for your daily coffee moment.
ingredients: 100% Natural Coffee Beans. Soluble Coffee.

name: Soft Tacos Crispy Chicken Spice Mix Mexican Style
description: OLD EL PASO SOFT TACOS CRISPY CHICKEN SPICE MIX MEXICAN STYLE 35G
long_description:
Add some crispiness to your Taco Tuesday with Mexican inspired Old El Paso Crispy Chicken Spice Mix. Simply toss 400g of chicken fillet in the seasoning mix for Mexican style golden, crispy chicken. Better yet, follow the recipe on the back on the pack for Mexican crispy chicken tacos in less than 25 minutes. Opt for soft tortillas or crunchy taco shells then add the crispy chicken, fresh veggies, salsa, cheese, guacamole, and sour cream. Vegan? No problem! Simply swap the meat for halloumi cheese — it's just as crispy and just as delicious. Old El Paso Crispy Chicken Spice Mix makes 10 mouth-watering soft tacos. Perfect for sharing, there's no greater happiness than eating Mexican food with the people you love.

This product is suitable for vegans.
  • This product is suitable for vegans.

  • Makes 10 mouth-watering soft tacos.

  • Crispy chicken tacos in less than 25 minutes.

  • Preservative Free

  • Mild

name: Medium Taco Sauce
description: OLD EL PASO MEDIUM TACO SAUCE 235G
long_description:
Turn every Tuesday into Taco Tuesday with the help of Old El Paso Medium Taco Sauce. Made with paprika, cayenne pepper, and jalapenos, Old El Paso medium taco topping sauce adds a hint of spice and vibrant Mexican flavour to your favourite homemade tacos. Whether you prefer soft tortillas or crunchy taco shells, stuff with your favourite meat filling (or vegetarian alternative), add your favourite toppings like cheese and guacamole, then finish this flavoursome taco sauce. Not sure the 'medium' heat level is for you? Opt for Old El Paso hot or mild alternatives. Better yet, try them all to see what heat level you can handle. Perfect for a midweek Mexican feast or weekend get-togethers, make tacos a regular on your weekly shopping list. Old El Paso Medium Taco Sauce works as a topping on 10 tacos.

Tip: Make it meat free and swap out the meat for veggies to make it vegan.

This product is suitable for vegetarians and vegans.

name: Stand N Stuff Taco Shell 10 Pack
description: OLD EL PASO STAND 'N STUFF TACO SHELLS 10 PACK 160G
long_description:
Taco Tuesday just got easier thanks to Old El Paso Stand 'N Stuff Taco Shells. Boasting a unique flat bottom, these crunchy corn taco shells stay upright, making them easy to fill and hold. If you're after crunchy beef tacos simply cook 500g of lean beef mince and 1 onion along with Old El Paso Taco Spice Mix for hearty tacos in less than 20 minutes. Prefer chicken? Mix things up and make the very same dish with your choice of meat or beans. Whatever you do, be creative, and get the whole family involved — don't forget to fill them with your favourite toppings (think cheese, sour cream, and guacamole!). Each pack of Old El Paso Stand 'N Stuff Taco Shells includes 10 crunchy corn tacos.
  • Shells stay upright, making them easy to fill and hold.

  • Less than 20 minutes.

  • This product is suitable for vegetarians and vegans.

  • Each pack of Old El Paso Stand 'N Stuff Taco Shells includes 10 crunchy corn tacos.

  • Mix things up and make the very same dish with your choice of meat or beans.

name: Gluten Free Tortillas
description: OLD EL PASO GLUTEN FREE TORTILLAS 216G
long_description:
Gluten free? It's time your tastebuds got to know Old El Paso Gluten Free Tortillas. Made with tapioca, quinoa, and corn, they're super soft and flexible, and taste just as great as Old El Paso regular flour tortillas. The perfect base for a whole range of delicious gluten free Mexican meals, wrap these tortillas around your favourite seasoned minced beef, shredded chicken, or vegetarian beans, then make your own Mexican style soft tacos, sizzling fajitas, cheesy enchiladas, and hot or cold lunch wraps. Preservative free and suitable for vegetarians and vegans, these gluten free tortillas are easy to use and fun to eat. Whether it's Fajita Friday, Taco Tuesday, or any other night of the week, bring your family and friends together to share the rich flavours of Mexican cuisine - gluten free!

This product is suitable for vegetarians and vegans.
  • Gluten Free

  • Preservative free

  • Suitable for vegetarians and vegans

  • 6 Tortillas

  • Super soft and flexible

name: Chilli & Garlic Rice Dinner Kit
description: OLD EL PASO CHILLI & GARLIC RICE KIT MEXICAN STYLE 355G
long_description:
If you like tacos or burritos, you're going to love Mexican rice, and it's never been easier to make at home thanks to Old El Paso Chili and Garlic Rice Kit. Each kit includes 1 Old El Paso Seasoned Quick Cook Rice, 1 Old El Paso Spice Mix, and 1 Old El Paso Chili and Garlic Cooking Sauce. Just add 500g of chicken fillet, 1 onion, 2 capsicums, and 1 cup of sweet corn, then simply cook altogether in the same frypan. In less than 20 minutes, you'll have a delicious Mexican inspired meal with minimal fuss. The best part? It works for lunch, dinner, and everything else in between. The Old El Paso Chili and Garlic Rice Kit serves 4 people. So round up all your family and friends and share the rich flavours of Mexican cuisine.

This product is suitable for vegetarians and vegans.
  • This product is suitable for vegetarians and vegans.

  • Less than 20 minutes

  • Serves 4 people

Cooking Sauce (42%): Tomatoes, Yellow Capsicum, Onion, Water, Salt, Garlic (3%), Smoky Red Chili Paste (3%) (Contains Wheat), Sugar, Flavours, Modified Corn Starch (1442), Vinegar, Food Acid (Citric Acid), Lemon Juice Concentrate (Contains Sulphites), Firming Agent (Calcium Chloride), Colour (Paprika Extract). name: Nachos Spice Mix
description: OLD EL PASO NACHOS SPICE MIX 35GM
long_description:
Nachos just got easier thanks to Old El Paso Nachos Spice Mix. The perfect blend of cumin, coriander, and paprika to bring out delicious Mexican inspired flavours. Just sprinkle the nachos seasoning mix on 500g beef mince, add 1 onion, then follow the instructions on the back of pack for your Mexican style Nachos meal to be ready to eat in 25 minutes. Get creative and add your favourite toppings — think avocado, cherry tomatoes, and jalapenos! Whether it's Taco Tuesday, Fajita Friday, or any other night of the week, share the rich flavours of Mexican cuisine with all your family and friends.

This product is suitable for vegans.
  • Suitable for vegans.

  • Serves 4

  • Preservative Free

  • Mild

name: Mild Taco Sauce
description: OLD EL PASO MILD TACO SAUCE 235G
long_description:
Turn every Tuesday into Taco Tuesday with the help of Old El Paso Mild Taco Sauce. Made with paprika, cayenne pepper, and jalapeno peppers, Old El Paso mild taco topping sauce adds a hint of spice and vibrant Mexican flavour to your favourite homemade tacos. Whether you prefer soft tortillas or crunchy taco shells, stuff with your favourite meat filling (or vegetarian alternative), add your favourite toppings like cheese and guacamole, then finish this with flavoursome taco sauce. Not sure the 'mild' heat level is for you? Opt for Old El Paso medium or hot alternatives. Better yet, try them all to see what heat level you can handle. Perfect for a midweek Mexican feast or weekend get-togethers, make tacos a regular on your weekly shopping list. Old El Paso Mild Taco Sauce works as a topping on 10 tacos.

Tip: Make it meat free and swap out the meat for veggies to make it vegan.

This product is suitable for vegetarians and vegans.

name: Kit Taco Mexican Style
description: OLD EL PASO TACO KIT 290G
long_description:
Your weekly Taco Tuesday night just got better thanks to this seriously tasty Mexican taco kit. Each taco kit includes 12 Old El Paso Original Taco Shells, 1 Old El Paso Spice Mix, and 1 Old El Paso Tomato Salsa for topping. For delicious tacos, just add 500g of lean beef mince and 1 onion, plus your choice of fresh salad and other favourite Mexican fillings (think guacamole, sour cream, and cheese), for mouth-watering Mexican tacos in less than 20 minutes. Vegetarian? No problem! Simply swap the meat for beans. The Old El Paso Mild Taco Kit makes 12 crunchy corn Mexican tacos. Ideal for families or entertaining, there's no greater happiness than eating Mexican food with people you love.

This product is suitable for vegetarians and vegans.
  • This product is suitable for vegetarians and vegans.

  • Makes 12 crunchy corn Mexican tacos.

  • Ideal for families or entertaining.

name: Thick N Chunky Mild Salsa
description: OLD EL PASO THICK N CHUNKY MILD SALSA 395G
long_description: If you're looking for a fun dinner idea, treat your taste buds to fresh Mexican inspired food. But be warned: whether it's Taco Tuesday or Fajita Friday, no Mexican meal is complete without Old El Paso Mild Thick 'N Chunky Salsa. The perfect balance of chunky, rich tomatoes and sweet capsicums, it's deliciously tangy, making it the must-have topping salsa for Mexican tacos, fajitas and burritos. You can even use it as a dip with nachos or tortilla chips. The best part? It's mild enough that even kids will love it. Make it your go-to for midweek Mexican feasts! If you prefer things spicy, opt for Old El Paso medium or hot Mexican style salsa alternatives. Old El Paso Mild Thick 'N Chunky Salsa is suitable for vegetarians and vegans.

name: Spice Mix For Tacos Mild
description: OLD EL PASO SPICE MIX FOR TACOS MILD 30G
long_description:
Spice up your night with Old El Paso Taco Spice Mix. The perfect blend of tomatoes, cumin, and garlic adds delicious Mexican flavours to your favourite tacos. Just sprinkle the taco seasoning mix on 500g of lean minced beef, add 1 onion, then follow the instructions on the back of the pack. After heating the taco shells and stuffing them with your filling, you'll have made ready to eat Mexican tacos in less than 25 minutes — ideal for Taco Tuesday. Don't forget to top with guacamole, cheese, sour cream, and salsa. Vegan? No problem. Simply swap the meat for beans. Perfect for a midweek Mexican feast or weekend get-togethers, share the rich flavours of Mexican cuisine with all your family and friends. Old El Paso Taco Spice Mix flavours up to 10 delicious tacos.

This product is suitable for vegans.

name: Mild Chunky Salsa Dip
description: OLD EL PASO MILD CHUNKY SALSA DIP 312G
long_description:
Hosting a party or gearing up for family dinner? It's time to bring out the Old El Paso Chunky Tomato Salsa Dip! Full of Mexican inspired flavour with chunky, rich tomatoes, and sweet capsicums. It's the perfect Mexican style dip to be enjoyed with nachos, tortilla chips, and more. Looking to turn up the heat? Opt for the Old El Paso 'hot' alternative. Better yet, try them both to see how much spice you can handle. Each Old El Paso Mild Chunky Tomato Mexican Salsa Dip is suitable for vegans and 1 jar is serves 4 people. So stock up, dip, crunch, and enjoy the fresh flavours of Mexican food with all your family and friends at your next fiesta. Old El Paso Chunky Salsa Dip is suitable for vegetarians and vegans.

name: Mexe Beans
description: OLD EL PASO MEXE BEANS 425G
long_description:
When you think of Mexican food, you think chicken or beef, but if you're looking for a meat-free alternative, it's time to think beans! We're talking Old El Paso Mexe Beans. Not only do they have the right amount of spice, meaning the kids will love them just as much as you will, but they are also 98% fat free. Simply warm them up in the microwave, or heat them on the stove, then use your imagination. Serve them as a side at your next Mexican feast, or use as a topping or filling for soft tacos, hearty burritos or sizzling fajitas. They're so easy and quick to prepare that you can even let your family and friends do their own thing.

name: Burrito Spice Mix
description: OLD EL PASO BURRITO SPICE MIX 40GM
long_description:
Spice up your night with Old El Paso Burrito Spice Mix. The delicious blend ground pinto beans, garlic, and black pepper adds vibrant Mexican flavours to your favourite burritos. Just sprinkle the burrito spice mix on 600g of chicken breast, add 1 onion, then follow the instructions on the back of the pack. After heating your tortilla wraps and stuffing them with the filling, you'll have made ready to eat Mexican style burritos in less than 25 minutes. Don't forget to load them with fresh salad, guacamole, cheese, sour cream, and salsa as well. Vegan? No problem. Simply swap the meat for mushrooms. Perfect for a midweek Mexican feast or weekend get-togethers, share the rich flavours of Mexican cuisine with all your family and friends. Old El Paso Burrito Spice Mix flavours up to 10 tasty burritos.

name: Stand 'n Stuff Soft Tortillas 8 Pack
description: OLD EL PASO STAND 'N STUFF SOFT TORTILLAS 8 PACK 193G
long_description:
Get your creative juices flowing this Fajita Friday or Taco Tuesday with Old El Paso Stand 'N Stuff Tortillas. The unique boat shape of these soft flour Mexican inspired tortillas allows for a whole range of delicious wrap-style dishes, and the flat bottom always keeps them upright, making them easy to fill and hold. Choose them as a versatile option for lunches or Mexican style dinners. Think tacos or fajitas! Got a sweet tooth? Make a dessert boat filled with all your favourite fruits. Whatever you do, be creative with your tortillas, and get the whole family involved - even the kids! 1 pack of Old El Paso Stand 'N Stuff Tortillas includes 8 soft flour tortillas and serves 3 to 4 people. Share the vibrant flavours of Mexican food with the ones you love.

This product is suitable for vegetarians and vegans.
  • This product is suitable for vegetarians and vegans.

  • 8 soft flour tortillas

  • Serves 3 to 4 people

name: Black Beans
description: OLD EL PASO BLACK BEANS 425G
long_description:
When you think of Mexican food, you think chicken or beef, but if you're looking for a meatless alternative, it's time to think beans! We're talking Old El Paso Black Beans, of course. A source of dietary fibre and a tasty vegetarian or vegan alternative, simply warm them up in the microwave or heat them on the stove, then eat them with almost anything. Serve them as a side at your next Mexican feast, use them as a filling for tacos, enchiladas, or burritos, or load them on top of your next plate of nachos. You can even eat them alone with your choice of fresh salad and a zesty salsa. Served hot or cold, they're perfect for sharing, so round up your family and friends and enjoy delicious Mexican food with the people you love.

This product is suitable for vegetarians and vegans.
  • This product is suitable for vegetarians and vegans.

  • Source of dietary fiber

  • Vegan Friendly

  • Mild

  • Ready to serve in 4-5 minutes
ingredients: Water, Black Beans (40%), Salt, Firming Agent (Calcium Chloride).

name: Chunky Salsa Dip Hot
description: OLD EL PASO CHUNKY SALSA DIP HOT 312G
long_description:
Hosting a party? It's time to bring out the Old El Paso Chunky Tomato Salsa Dip! It's deliciously hot with chunky, rich tomatoes and spices, making it an ideal Mexican style dip to be enjoyed with tortilla chips and nachos. Not sure the 'hot' heat level on this sauce is for you? Opt for the Old El Paso mild alternative. Better yet, try them both to see how much spice you can handle. Each Old El Paso Hot Chunky Tomato Salsa Dip is suitable for vegetarians and vegans and 1 jar serves for 4 people. So stock up, dip, crunch, and enjoy the fresh flavours of Mexican food with all your family and friends at your next fiesta.
  • Suitable for vegetarians and vegans

  • 99% Fat Free

  • HOT

  • 1 jar serves for 4 people.

  • It's deliciously hot with chunky, rich tomatoes and spices.

name: Mexican Style Hard N Soft Taco Kit
description: OLD EL PASO HARD N SOFT TACO KIT MEXICAN STYLE 350G
long_description: Make Taco Tuesday a weekly event with this tasty Mexican inspired Taco Kit for dinner. Each taco kit includes 5 Old El Paso Stand 'N Stuff™ Crunchy Corn Taco Shells, 5 Old El Paso™ Soft Flour Tortillas, 1 Old El Paso™ Taco Spice Mix, and 1 Old El Paso™ Tomato Salsa. Just add 600g of lean beef mince, 1 onion, lettuce, and avocado to enjoy classic Mexican style tacos in less than 30 minutes. But you can fill them with almost anything! Perfect for a family dinner, everyone can enjoy hard taco shells and soft flour tortillas with one Mexican inspired taco kit. So round up your family and friends, get creative, and share the rich flavours of Mexican cuisine. Each Old El Paso™ Bulk Hard 'N Soft Taco Kit makes 10 tasty tacos. Tip: Make it meat free and swap out the meat for veggies to make it vegan. This product is suitable for vegetarians and vegans.

name: Hot Taco Sauce
description: OLD EL PASO HOT TACO SAUCE 235G
long_description:
Turn every Tuesday into Taco Tuesday with the help of Old El Paso Hot Taco Sauce . Made with paprika, cayenne pepper, and jalapeno peppers, Old El Paso hot taco topping sauce adds spiciness and vibrant Mexican flavour to your favourite homemade tacos. Whether you prefer soft tortillas or crunchy taco shells, stuff with your favourite meat filling (or vegeterian alternative), add your favourite toppings like cheese and guacamole, then finish with this flavoursome taco sauce. Not sure the 'hot' heat level is for you? Opt for Old El Paso Taco Sauce Medium or Mild alternatives. Better yet, try them all to see what heat level you can handle. Perfect for a midweek Mexican feast or weekend get-togethers, make tacos a regular on your weekly shopping list. Old El Paso Hot Taco Sauce works as a topping on 10 tacos.

Tip: Make it meat free and swap out the meat for veggies to make it vegan.

This product is suitable for vegetarians and vegans.

name: Chilli Con Carne Spice Mix
description: OLD EL PASO CHILLI CON CARNE SPICE MIX 35GM
long_description:
Mexican style chili con carne tastes best with this rich blend of tomatoes, paprika, and chili. Simply add 600g of beef or lamb, 1 onion, 400g of canned tomatoes, and 125g of canned kidney beans to make the iconic Mexican meal in less than 25 minutes. Serve warm with your choice of freshly chopped vegetables and a dollop of sour cream, then enjoy the flavours of Mexican cuisine with your family and friends. Suitable for vegans, you can make your chili con carne without meat by adding more beans — it tastes just as delicious. 1 pack of Old El Paso Chili Spice Mix flavours a family portion of chili con carne. But you can use it in a whole range of Mexican dishes!
  • Suitable for vegans

  • 1 pack of Old El Paso Chili Spice Mix flavours a family portion of chili con carne.

  • Less than 25 minutes.

  • Preservative Free

  • Medium

name: Reduced Salt Taco Spice Mix
description: OLD EL PASO REDUCED SALT TACO SPICE MIX 30G
long_description:
Spice up your night with Old El Paso Reduced Salt Taco Spice Mix. The perfect blend of rich tomatoes, cumin, and garlic adds delicious Mexican flavours to your favourite tacos. Just sprinkle the taco seasoning over 500g of lean beef mince and fry with 1 onion for a hearty taco filling in less than 25 minutes. Simply load into soft tortilla wraps or crunchy taco shells (or both) and add all your favourite toppings — think cheese, guacamole, sour cream, and tomato salsa — for tasty Mexican style tacos the Old El Paso way. Vegan? No problem. Simply swap the meat for beans. Each Old El Paso Reduced Salt Taco Spice Mix seasons up to 10 tacos. Perfect for sharing, there's no greater happiness than eating Mexican food with people you love.

This product is suitable for vegans.

name: Refried Beans
description: OLD EL PASO REFRIED BEANS 435G
long_description:
If you like baked beans, you're going to love refried beans and no one does them better than Old El Paso. Despite their name, these tasty Mexican beans are not fried - they are made from hearty pinto beans and blended with Mexican spices to create a delicious paste. Simply warm them up in the microwave or heat them on the stove, then mix with your favourite tomato salsa and use as a topping for nachos, tacos, burritos, and more. You can even use them as a dip with tortilla chips! With just a hint of chili, these refried beans will be loved by kids and vegans, alike. Perfect for a midweek Mexican feast or weekend get-togethers, make refried beans a regular on your weekly shopping list.

This product is suitable for vegetarians and vegans.
  • This product is suitable for vegetarians and vegans.

  • 99% Fat Free

  • Source of dietary fiber

  • Vegan

  • Mild

name: Enchilada Cooking Sauce
description: OLD EL PASO ENCHILADA COOKING SAUCE 375G
long_description:
Delicious homemade enchiladas call for one thing - Old El Paso Enchilada Cooking Sauce. Made with rich tomatoes, sweet red capsicums, onion, garlic, and cumin, it has just the right amount of spice that even kids will like it. Simply pair with 10 Old El Paso Mini Flour Tortillas, 500g of chicken thigh fillets, 1 onion, 1 zucchini, 1 cup of mozzarella, and 1/2 cup of sour cream for mouth-watering enchiladas, which can be prepared in less than 30 minutes. Vegetarian? No problem! Swap meat for mushrooms. Easy, quick, and fun to make, follow the enchilada recipe on the back of the jar and let the whole family join in. Perfect for a midweek Mexican feast or weekend get-togethers, make it a regular on your weekly shopping list. Because there's no better way to enjoy each other's company than by sharing delicious Mexican food.

Tip: Make it meat free and swap out the meat for veggies to make it vegan.

This product is suitable for vegetarians and vegans.
  • This product is suitable for vegetarians and vegans.

name: Mild Fajita Kit Mexican Style
description: OLD EL PASO MILD FAJITA KIT  485G
long_description:
Cooking Mexican style fajitas just got easier thanks to Old El Paso Fajita Kit. Each fajita kit includes 8 Old El Paso Super Soft and Flexible Flour Tortillas, 1 Old El Paso Fajita Spice Mix, and 1 Old El Paso tomato salsa for topping, so all you need to add to your shopping list is 600 g of chicken thigh or breast, 1 onion, and 2 capsicums. Simply follow the recipe on the back of the box for sizzling fajitas in less than 25 minutes. Vegetarian? No problem! Swap meat for mushrooms - they're just as delicious. Each Mexican inspired Old El Paso Fajita Kit makes 8 tasty fajitas. Whether it's Fajita Friday or any other night of the week, bring your family and friends together to share the rich flavours of Mexican cuisine.

Tip: Make it meat free and swap out the meat for veggies to make it vegan.

This product is suitable for vegetarians and vegans.

name: Nachos Topping
description: OLD EL PASO NACHOS TOPPING 390G
long_description:
If you're looking for a fun, quick dinner idea, treat your taste buds to Mexican style nachos. Whether you're eating them on Taco Tuesday or Fajita Friday, there's no such thing as nachos without Old El Paso nachos salsa for topping. A delicious blend of pinto beans, tomatoes, capsicums, jalapenos, peppers, garlic, and spices, it's the easiest way to bring vibrant Mexican flavours to your table. You can even use it as a dip with tortilla chips. The best part? It's not too spicy so even the kids will love it. Suitable for vegetarians and vegans, one jar of Old El Paso Mild Nachos Topping is suggested for 4 people. So round up your family and friends, make a big batch of nachos, and share the rich flavours of Mexican cuisine.
